column6: This crate owns private flow-trace-v0 checkpoint and virtual-extent experiments; it explicitly does not own production layout or public checkpoint formats.
This crate owns private retained-Parley adapter observations and conformance gaps; it explicitly does not own a production adapter or public prepared-text API.
This crate owns private identity-trace-v0 canonical-storage candidates and measurements; it explicitly does not own production storage or public position APIs.
This crate owns private text-data tier artifact and replay measurements; it explicitly does not own production providers or text-data APIs.
This crate owns Underwood's dependency-free semantic-to-scene façade and private foundational modules; it explicitly does not own text shaping physics, host policy, or rendering.
This crate owns repository policy validation; it explicitly does not own product behavior or architectural decisions.
